mapper.select:
SELECT pr.id, pr.name, pr.description, pr.price, pr.original_price, pr.cover_image, pr.image_urls, pr.seller_id, pr.condition_level, pr.status, pr.view_count, pr.like_count, pr.location, pr.campus_tag, pr.created_at, u.nickname AS seller_name, u.avatar AS seller_avatar, u.username AS seller_username FROM products pr LEFT JOIN users u ON pr.seller_id = u.id
pr.status = 1
AND (pr.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products pr LEFT JOIN users u ON pr.seller_id = u.id
pr.status = 1
AND (pr.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
